tech_news.title: 'They Now Wait for This Storm to Pass' — PS5 Owners Are Cancelling PlayStation Plus Subscriptions to Protest Sony Killing Discs, but Analysts Say It Won't Make Any Difference - IGN
tech_news.description: PS5 owners are cancelling PlayStation Plus subscriptions in protest at Sony's controversial decision to stop releasing games on physical discs — but the gesture will not force the console maker to change its mind, analysts say.

tech_news.title: New ‘Fallout’ Game Reportedly Coming From Obsidian, ‘Avowed 2’ Cancelled - Forbes
tech_news.description: Obsidian has reportedly cancelled a sequel to Avowed, and will instead work on a new Fallout game under the direction of Fallout New Vegas’ Josh Sawyer.
